task_completion.description: Align the 8 cytochrome c protein sequences using MUSCLE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing a multiple sequence alignment of 8 sequences, or the MUSCLE alignment dialog being executed.

task_completion.description: Export the initial alignment in ClustalW format to initial_cytochrome.aln.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE export dialog showing the path '~/UGENE_Data/curated_alignment/initial_cytochrome.aln' and ClustalW format, or the file visible in a file manager/terminal.

task_completion.description: Remove the outgroup sequence (P00053) from the alignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE alignment view showing exactly 7 sequences remaining, with the identifier 'P00053' no longer present in the sequence list.

task_completion.description: Delete the first 15 and last 15 columns of the alignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing the selection and deletion of 15 columns at the start and end of the alignment, or the alignment length visibly reduced by 30 columns.

task_completion.description: Export the curated alignment in ClustalW format to curated_cytochrome.aln.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE export dialog showing the path '~/UGENE_Data/curated_alignment/curated_cytochrome.aln' and ClustalW format, or the file visible in a file manager/terminal.

task_completion.description: Create a report containing the initial and final alignment lengths and a note regarding the removal of P00053.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'curation_report.txt' with text mentioning the initial length, final length, and the removal of P00053.

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE GUI to perform the alignment and curation tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the UGENE application windows, menus, and alignment editor, rather than using command-line tools or python scripts to manipulate the FASTA/ALN files.

integrity.description: The agent exported the files using the software's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of UGENE 'Export Alignment' dialogs rather than manually renaming or moving files in the terminal to fake the output.

integrity.description: The curation report contains actual observed lengths rather than just repeating the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file should contain specific numeric values for the initial and final column lengths, indicating the agent actually checked the alignment lengths in UGENE.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial alignment must contain exactly 8 sequences. The curated alignment must contain exactly 7 sequences after removing the outgroup 'P00053'. Exactly 15 columns must be trimmed from both the beginning and the end of the alignment.
